introductionSomali: Unit-kan wuxuu barayaa hiwaayadaha, hawlaha gudaha iyo dibadda, preferences, verb-ing, to + verb, frequency, ciyaaraha, muusigga, filimada, buugaagta, opinions, recommendations, invitations, arrangements, Past Simple, Present Perfect, posters, tickets iyo reviews.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Hiwaayadaha caadiga ah waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad, examples free-time oo dabiici ah, grammar A2 iyo practice kala duwan.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga iyo phrases-ka Hiwaayadaha caadiga ah.
Adeegso grammar-ka casharkan jumlado dabiici ah.
Samee speaking iyo writing task adigoo adeegsanaya xog mala-awaal ah.

grammar.explanationSomali: Casharku wuxuu vocabulary-ga ku xiriirinayaa Present Simple iyo weedho isgaarsiin oo heerka A2 ah.
grammar.rule: Adeegso vocabulary-ga casharkan jumlad dabiici ah oo leh subject, verb iyo free-time context.

questionExamples.somali: Intee jeer ayaad hawshan ku samaysaa jadwalka tusaalaha ah?

questionExamples.english: Would you like to join the fictional club on Saturday?
questionExamples.somali: Ma jeclaan lahayd inaad Sabtida ku biirto naadiga mala-awaalka ah?

commonMistakesSomali: Ha isku khaldin verb-ing iyo to + verb; eeg falka ka horreeya.
Present Perfect ha la raacin yesterday ama finished time.
Sports-ka u dooro play, go ama do collocation-ka saxda ah.

dialogues.titleSomali: Hiwaayadaha caadiga ah: wada hadal koowaad • vocabulary • comprehension • role-play

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: What do you usually do in your fictional free-time plan?
lines.somali: Maxaad caadi ahaan ku samaysaa qorshaha firaaqada ee tusaalaha ah?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Reading short stories has helped Abdi learn useful English expressions.
lines.somali: Akhrinta sheekooyinka gaagaaban waxay Cabdi ka caawisay inuu barto weedho English ah oo waxtar leh.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Why do you enjoy that activity?
lines.somali: Maxaad hawshaas ugu raaxaysataa?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Because it is relaxing and fits my example schedule.
lines.somali: Sababtoo ah waa nasasho, waxayna ku habboon tahay jadwalkayga tusaalaha ah.

dialogues.titleSomali: Hiwaayadaha caadiga ah: wada hadal labaad • response • best answer • speaking

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Would you like to join our fictional activity on Saturday?
lines.somali: Ma jeclaan lahayd inaad Sabtida nagula soo biirto hawsha mala-awaalka ah?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Yes, I’d love to. What time shall we meet?
lines.somali: Haa, aad baan u jeclaan lahaa. Saacaddee ayaan kulmaynaa?

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Writing is included in Amal’s weekend hobby plan because it gives her useful free time.
lines.somali: Writing waxaa lagu daray qorshaha hiwaayadda dhammaadka toddobaadka ee Amal, sababtoo ah waqti waxtar leh ayuu siiyaa.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: That sounds good. I will confirm the plan tomorrow.
lines.somali: Taasi way fiican tahay. Berri ayaan qorshaha xaqiijinayaa.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Hawlaha gudaha iyo dibadda waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad, examples free-time oo dabiici ah, grammar A2 iyo practice kala duwan.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga iyo phrases-ka Hawlaha gudaha iyo dibadda.
Adeegso grammar-ka casharkan jumlado dabiici ah.
Samee speaking iyo writing task adigoo adeegsanaya xog mala-awaal ah.

negativeExamples.english: The example learner does not choose the activity without checking the time.

negativeExamples.english: They are not meeting at the fictional venue this evening.
negativeExamples.somali: Fiidkan kuma kulmayaan goobta mala-awaalka ah.

questionExamples.english: How often do you do this activity in the example schedule?
questionExamples.somali: Intee jeer ayaad hawshan ku samaysaa jadwalka tusaalaha ah?

commonMistakesSomali: Ha isku khaldin verb-ing iyo to + verb; eeg falka ka horreeya.
Present Perfect ha la raacin yesterday ama finished time.
Sports-ka u dooro play, go ama do collocation-ka saxda ah.

dialogues.titleSomali: Hawlaha gudaha iyo dibadda: wada hadal koowaad • vocabulary • comprehension • role-play

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: What do you usually do in your fictional free-time plan?
lines.somali: Maxaad caadi ahaan ku samaysaa qorshaha firaaqada ee tusaalaha ah?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: The fictional family chose to read a book together during their free Saturday afternoon.
lines.somali: Qoyska mala-awaalka ahi wuxuu doortay inuu read a book wada sameeyo Sabtida galabtii.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Why do you enjoy that activity?
lines.somali: Maxaad hawshaas ugu raaxaysataa?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Because it is relaxing and fits my example schedule.
lines.somali: Sababtoo ah waa nasasho, waxayna ku habboon tahay jadwalkayga tusaalaha ah.

dialogues.titleSomali: Hawlaha gudaha iyo dibadda: wada hadal labaad • response • best answer • speaking

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Would you like to join our fictional activity on Saturday?
lines.somali: Ma jeclaan lahayd inaad Sabtida nagula soo biirto hawsha mala-awaalka ah?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Yes, I’d love to. What time shall we meet?
lines.somali: Haa, aad baan u jeclaan lahaa. Saacaddee ayaan kulmaynaa?

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: The fictional family chose to watch television together during their free Saturday afternoon.
lines.somali: Qoyska mala-awaalka ahi wuxuu doortay inuu watch television wada sameeyo Sabtida galabtii.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: That sounds good. I will confirm the plan tomorrow.
lines.somali: Taasi way fiican tahay. Berri ayaan qorshaha xaqiijinayaa.

lessons.titleSomali: Ka hadalka waxyaabaha la jecel yahay iyo kuwa aan la jeclayn
lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Ka hadalka waxyaabaha la jecel yahay iyo kuwa aan la jeclayn waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad, examples free-time oo dabiici ah, grammar A2 iyo practice kala duwan.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga iyo phrases-ka Ka hadalka waxyaabaha la jecel yahay iyo kuwa aan la jeclayn.
Adeegso grammar-ka casharkan jumlado dabiici ah.
Samee speaking iyo writing task adigoo adeegsanaya xog mala-awaal ah.

grammar.titleEnglish: Talking About Likes and Dislikes grammar
grammar.titleSomali: Naxwaha Ka hadalka waxyaabaha la jecel yahay iyo kuwa aan la jeclayn
grammar.explanationSomali: Like, love, enjoy, hate iyo prefer waxaa badanaa ka dambeeya verb-ing marka hawl la jecel yahay laga hadlayo.
grammar.rule: Like, love, enjoy, hate iyo prefer waxaa badanaa ka dambeeya verb-ing marka hawl la jecel yahay laga hadlayo.

dialogues.titleSomali: Ka hadalka waxyaabaha la jecel yahay iyo kuwa aan la jeclayn: wada hadal koowaad • vocabulary • comprehension • role-play

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: What do you usually do in your fictional free-time plan?
lines.somali: Maxaad caadi ahaan ku samaysaa qorshaha firaaqada ee tusaalaha ah?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: In the example conversation, the learner uses “Like” to describe a clear preference about weekend activities.
lines.somali: Wada hadalka tusaalaha ah, ardaygu wuxuu “Like” u adeegsadaa inuu ku sheego waxa uu ka doorbidayo hawlaha toddobaadka.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Why do you enjoy that activity?
lines.somali: Maxaad hawshaas ugu raaxaysataa?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Because it is relaxing and fits my example schedule.
lines.somali: Sababtoo ah waa nasasho, waxayna ku habboon tahay jadwalkayga tusaalaha ah.

dialogues.titleSomali: Ka hadalka waxyaabaha la jecel yahay iyo kuwa aan la jeclayn: wada hadal labaad • response • best answer • speaking

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Would you like to join our fictional activity on Saturday?
lines.somali: Ma jeclaan lahayd inaad Sabtida nagula soo biirto hawsha mala-awaalka ah?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Yes, I’d love to. What time shall we meet?
lines.somali: Haa, aad baan u jeclaan lahaa. Saacaddee ayaan kulmaynaa?

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: In the example conversation, the learner uses “Love” to describe a clear preference about weekend activities.
lines.somali: Wada hadalka tusaalaha ah, ardaygu wuxuu “Love” u adeegsadaa inuu ku sheego waxa uu ka doorbidayo hawlaha toddobaadka.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: That sounds good. I will confirm the plan tomorrow.
lines.somali: Taasi way fiican tahay. Berri ayaan qorshaha xaqiijinayaa.

grammar.titleSomali: Naxwaha Falalka ay ka dambeeyaan Verb-ing
grammar.explanationSomali: Enjoy waxaa mar kasta ka dambeeya verb-ing; like, love iyo prefer-na unit-kan verb-ing ayaa xoogga la saarayaa.
grammar.rule: Enjoy waxaa mar kasta ka dambeeya verb-ing; like, love iyo prefer-na unit-kan verb-ing ayaa xoogga la saarayaa.

lines.english: What do you usually do in your fictional free-time plan?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: The phrase “Like reading” correctly uses an activity form in the fictional hobby discussion.
lines.somali: Weedha “Like reading” waxay si sax ah u adeegsanaysaa qaabka hawsha ee wada hadalka hiwaayadda.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Why do you enjoy that activity?
lines.somali: Maxaad hawshaas ugu raaxaysataa?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Because it is relaxing and fits my example schedule.
lines.somali: Sababtoo ah waa nasasho, waxayna ku habboon tahay jadwalkayga tusaalaha ah.

lines.english: Would you like to join our fictional activity on Saturday?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Yes, I’d love to. What time shall we meet?
lines.somali: Haa, aad baan u jeclaan lahaa. Saacaddee ayaan kulmaynaa?

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: The phrase “Love travelling” correctly uses an activity form in the fictional hobby discussion.
lines.somali: Weedha “Love travelling” waxay si sax ah u adeegsanaysaa qaabka hawsha ee wada hadalka hiwaayadda.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: That sounds good. I will confirm the plan tomorrow.
lines.somali: Taasi way fiican tahay. Berri ayaan qorshaha xaqiijinayaa.

grammar.titleSomali: Naxwaha Falalka ay ka dambeeyaan To iyo fal
grammar.explanationSomali: Want, would like, plan, hope, decide, need, learn iyo try waxaa ka dambeeya to + base verb.
grammar.rule: Want, would like, plan, hope, decide, need, learn iyo try waxaa ka dambeeya to + base verb.

commonMistakesSomali: Ha isku khaldin verb-ing iyo to + verb; eeg falka ka horreeya.
Present Perfect ha la raacin yesterday ama finished time.
Sports-ka u dooro play, go ama do collocation-ka saxda ah.

dialogues.titleSomali: Falalka ay ka dambeeyaan To iyo fal: wada hadal koowaad • vocabulary • comprehension • role-play

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: What do you usually do in your fictional free-time plan?
lines.somali: Maxaad caadi ahaan ku samaysaa qorshaha firaaqada ee tusaalaha ah?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: The phrase “Want to” introduces a realistic plan for the fictional weekend activity.
lines.somali: Weedha “Want to” waxay soo bandhigaysaa qorshe macquul ah oo hawsha toddobaadka ah.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Why do you enjoy that activity?
lines.somali: Maxaad hawshaas ugu raaxaysataa?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Because it is relaxing and fits my example schedule.
lines.somali: Sababtoo ah waa nasasho, waxayna ku habboon tahay jadwalkayga tusaalaha ah.

dialogues.titleSomali: Falalka ay ka dambeeyaan To iyo fal: wada hadal labaad • response • best answer • speaking

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Would you like to join our fictional activity on Saturday?
lines.somali: Ma jeclaan lahayd inaad Sabtida nagula soo biirto hawsha mala-awaalka ah?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Yes, I’d love to. What time shall we meet?
lines.somali: Haa, aad baan u jeclaan lahaa. Saacaddee ayaan kulmaynaa?

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: The phrase “Would like to” introduces a realistic plan for the fictional weekend activity.
lines.somali: Weedha “Would like to” waxay soo bandhigaysaa qorshe macquul ah oo hawsha toddobaadka ah.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: That sounds good. I will confirm the plan tomorrow.
lines.somali: Taasi way fiican tahay. Berri ayaan qorshaha xaqiijinayaa.

lessons.titleSomali: Inta jeer ee hawlaha firaaqada la sameeyo
lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Inta jeer ee hawlaha firaaqada la sameeyo waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad, examples free-time oo dabiici ah, grammar A2 iyo practice kala duwan.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga iyo phrases-ka Inta jeer ee hawlaha firaaqada la sameeyo.
Adeegso grammar-ka casharkan jumlado dabiici ah.
Samee speaking iyo writing task adigoo adeegsanaya xog mala-awaal ah.

grammar.titleSomali: Naxwaha Inta jeer ee hawlaha firaaqada la sameeyo
grammar.explanationSomali: Frequency adverb-ku wuxuu yimaadaa kahor main verb-ka, laakiin wuxuu ka dambeeyaa verb to be.
grammar.rule: Frequency adverb-ku wuxuu yimaadaa kahor main verb-ka, laakiin wuxuu ka dambeeyaa verb to be.
grammar.sentenceStructure: subject + frequency adverb + main verb; subject + be + frequency adverb.

commonMistakesSomali: Ha isku khaldin verb-ing iyo to + verb; eeg falka ka horreeya.
Present Perfect ha la raacin yesterday ama finished time.
Sports-ka u dooro play, go ama do collocation-ka saxda ah.

dialogues.titleSomali: Inta jeer ee hawlaha firaaqada la sameeyo: wada hadal koowaad • vocabulary • comprehension • role-play

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: What do you usually do in your fictional free-time plan?
lines.somali: Maxaad caadi ahaan ku samaysaa qorshaha firaaqada ee tusaalaha ah?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: The example learner always chooses an outdoor activity when the weather is cool.
lines.somali: Ardayga tusaalaha ahi always wuxuu doortaa hawl dibadeed marka cimiladu qabow tahay.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Why do you enjoy that activity?
lines.somali: Maxaad hawshaas ugu raaxaysataa?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Because it is relaxing and fits my example schedule.
lines.somali: Sababtoo ah waa nasasho, waxayna ku habboon tahay jadwalkayga tusaalaha ah.

dialogues.titleSomali: Inta jeer ee hawlaha firaaqada la sameeyo: wada hadal labaad • response • best answer • speaking

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Would you like to join our fictional activity on Saturday?
lines.somali: Ma jeclaan lahayd inaad Sabtida nagula soo biirto hawsha mala-awaalka ah?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Yes, I’d love to. What time shall we meet?
lines.somali: Haa, aad baan u jeclaan lahaa. Saacaddee ayaan kulmaynaa?

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: The example learner usually chooses an outdoor activity when the weather is cool.
lines.somali: Ardayga tusaalaha ahi usually wuxuu doortaa hawl dibadeed marka cimiladu qabow tahay.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: That sounds good. I will confirm the plan tomorrow.
lines.somali: Taasi way fiican tahay. Berri ayaan qorshaha xaqiijinayaa.

lessons.speakingPractice: Sheeg inta jeer ee qof tusaale ahi sameeyo shan hawlood.
lessons.writingPractice: Qor weekly free-time schedule leh maalmo, waqtiyo iyo frequency expressions.
lessons.summarySomali: Waxaad casharkan ku baratay Inta jeer ee hawlaha firaaqada la sameeyo, collocations-keeda, grammar-ka lagama maarmaanka ah iyo sida loogu adeegsado xaalad firaaqo oo dabiici ah.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Ciyaaraha iyo tartamada waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad, examples free-time oo dabiici ah, grammar A2 iyo practice kala duwan.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga iyo phrases-ka Ciyaaraha iyo tartamada.
Adeegso grammar-ka casharkan jumlado dabiici ah.
Samee speaking iyo writing task adigoo adeegsanaya xog mala-awaal ah.

dialogues.titleSomali: Ciyaaraha iyo tartamada: wada hadal koowaad • vocabulary • comprehension • role-play

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: What do you usually do in your fictional free-time plan?
lines.somali: Maxaad caadi ahaan ku samaysaa qorshaha firaaqada ee tusaalaha ah?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: The community club uses football in a safe fictional activity every Saturday morning.
lines.somali: Naadiga bulshadu wuxuu football ku isticmaalaa hawl ammaan ah oo mala-awaal ah subax kasta oo Sabti ah.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Why do you enjoy that activity?
lines.somali: Maxaad hawshaas ugu raaxaysataa?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Because it is relaxing and fits my example schedule.
lines.somali: Sababtoo ah waa nasasho, waxayna ku habboon tahay jadwalkayga tusaalaha ah.

dialogues.titleSomali: Ciyaaraha iyo tartamada: wada hadal labaad • response • best answer • speaking

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Would you like to join our fictional activity on Saturday?
lines.somali: Ma jeclaan lahayd inaad Sabtida nagula soo biirto hawsha mala-awaalka ah?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Yes, I’d love to. What time shall we meet?
lines.somali: Haa, aad baan u jeclaan lahaa. Saacaddee ayaan kulmaynaa?

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: The community club uses basketball in a safe fictional activity every Saturday morning.
lines.somali: Naadiga bulshadu wuxuu basketball ku isticmaalaa hawl ammaan ah oo mala-awaal ah subax kasta oo Sabti ah.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: That sounds good. I will confirm the plan tomorrow.
lines.somali: Taasi way fiican tahay. Berri ayaan qorshaha xaqiijinayaa.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Ka hadalka ciyaaraha waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad, examples free-time oo dabiici ah, grammar A2 iyo practice kala duwan.

grammar.explanationSomali: Present Simple waxaa loo adeegsadaa routine-ka ciyaarta; Present Perfect-na experience ama muddada ilaa hadda.
grammar.rule: Present Simple waxaa loo adeegsadaa routine-ka ciyaarta; Present Perfect-na experience ama muddada ilaa hadda.
grammar.sentenceStructure: How often + do/does + subject + base verb?; subject + have/has + participle.

commonMistakesSomali: Ha isku khaldin verb-ing iyo to + verb; eeg falka ka horreeya.
Present Perfect ha la raacin yesterday ama finished time.
Sports-ka u dooro play, go ama do collocation-ka saxda ah.

dialogues.titleSomali: Ka hadalka ciyaaraha: wada hadal koowaad • vocabulary • comprehension • role-play

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: What do you usually do in your fictional free-time plan?
lines.somali: Maxaad caadi ahaan ku samaysaa qorshaha firaaqada ee tusaalaha ah?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: The sports interview uses “Which sports do you play?” before the player explains the fictional team’s routine.
lines.somali: Wareysiga ciyaaruhu wuxuu adeegsadaa “Which sports do you play?” kahor inta ciyaaryahanku sharxin jadwalka kooxda mala-awaalka ah.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Why do you enjoy that activity?
lines.somali: Maxaad hawshaas ugu raaxaysataa?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Because it is relaxing and fits my example schedule.
lines.somali: Sababtoo ah waa nasasho, waxayna ku habboon tahay jadwalkayga tusaalaha ah.

dialogues.titleSomali: Ka hadalka ciyaaraha: wada hadal labaad • response • best answer • speaking

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Would you like to join our fictional activity on Saturday?
lines.somali: Ma jeclaan lahayd inaad Sabtida nagula soo biirto hawsha mala-awaalka ah?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Yes, I’d love to. What time shall we meet?
lines.somali: Haa, aad baan u jeclaan lahaa. Saacaddee ayaan kulmaynaa?

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: The sports interview uses “How often do you practise?” before the player explains the fictional team’s routine.
lines.somali: Wareysiga ciyaaruhu wuxuu adeegsadaa “How often do you practise?” kahor inta ciyaaryahanku sharxin jadwalka kooxda mala-awaalka ah.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: That sounds good. I will confirm the plan tomorrow.
lines.somali: Taasi way fiican tahay. Berri ayaan qorshaha xaqiijinayaa.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Muusigga waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad, examples free-time oo dabiici ah, grammar A2 iyo practice kala duwan.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga iyo phrases-ka Muusigga.
Adeegso grammar-ka casharkan jumlado dabiici ah.
Samee speaking iyo writing task adigoo adeegsanaya xog mala-awaal ah.

grammar.explanationSomali: Casharku wuxuu vocabulary-ga ku xiriirinayaa Present Simple iyo weedho isgaarsiin oo heerka A2 ah.
grammar.rule: Adeegso vocabulary-ga casharkan jumlad dabiici ah oo leh subject, verb iyo free-time context.

positiveExamples.english: The fictional music club practises music before its community performance.
positiveExamples.somali: Naadiga muusigga ee mala-awaalka ahi wuxuu music ku tababartaa kahor bandhiggiisa bulshada.

positiveExamples.english: The fictional music club practises song before its community performance.
positiveExamples.somali: Naadiga muusigga ee mala-awaalka ahi wuxuu song ku tababartaa kahor bandhiggiisa bulshada.

positiveExamples.english: The singer performed two original songs at the fictional community concert.
positiveExamples.somali: Heesaagu wuxuu bandhigga bulshada ee mala-awaalka ah ku qaaday laba heesood oo cusub.

positiveExamples.english: The musician practises the guitar for an hour before each performance.
positiveExamples.somali: Muusikiistuhu wuxuu gitaarka tababartaa saacad kahor bandhig kasta.

positiveExamples.english: The fictional music club practises band before its community performance.
positiveExamples.somali: Naadiga muusigga ee mala-awaalka ahi wuxuu band ku tababartaa kahor bandhiggiisa bulshada.

positiveExamples.english: The fictional music club practises instrument before its community performance.
positiveExamples.somali: Naadiga muusigga ee mala-awaalka ahi wuxuu instrument ku tababartaa kahor bandhiggiisa bulshada.

positiveExamples.english: The fictional music club practises guitar before its community performance.
positiveExamples.somali: Naadiga muusigga ee mala-awaalka ahi wuxuu guitar ku tababartaa kahor bandhiggiisa bulshada.

positiveExamples.english: The fictional music club practises piano before its community performance.
positiveExamples.somali: Naadiga muusigga ee mala-awaalka ahi wuxuu piano ku tababartaa kahor bandhiggiisa bulshada.

negativeExamples.english: The example learner does not choose the activity without checking the time.
negativeExamples.somali: Ardayga tusaalaha ahi hawsha ma doorto isaga oo aan waqtiga hubin.

negativeExamples.english: They are not meeting at the fictional venue this evening.
negativeExamples.somali: Fiidkan kuma kulmayaan goobta mala-awaalka ah.

questionExamples.english: How often do you do this activity in the example schedule?
questionExamples.somali: Intee jeer ayaad hawshan ku samaysaa jadwalka tusaalaha ah?

questionExamples.english: Would you like to join the fictional club on Saturday?
questionExamples.somali: Ma jeclaan lahayd inaad Sabtida ku biirto naadiga mala-awaalka ah?

commonMistakesSomali: Ha isku khaldin verb-ing iyo to + verb; eeg falka ka horreeya.
Present Perfect ha la raacin yesterday ama finished time.
Sports-ka u dooro play, go ama do collocation-ka saxda ah.

dialogues.titleSomali: Muusigga: wada hadal koowaad • vocabulary • comprehension • role-play

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: What do you usually do in your fictional free-time plan?
lines.somali: Maxaad caadi ahaan ku samaysaa qorshaha firaaqada ee tusaalaha ah?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: The fictional music club practises music before its community performance.
lines.somali: Naadiga muusigga ee mala-awaalka ahi wuxuu music ku tababartaa kahor bandhiggiisa bulshada.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Why do you enjoy that activity?
lines.somali: Maxaad hawshaas ugu raaxaysataa?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Because it is relaxing and fits my example schedule.
lines.somali: Sababtoo ah waa nasasho, waxayna ku habboon tahay jadwalkayga tusaalaha ah.

dialogues.titleSomali: Muusigga: wada hadal labaad • response • best answer • speaking

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Would you like to join our fictional activity on Saturday?
lines.somali: Ma jeclaan lahayd inaad Sabtida nagula soo biirto hawsha mala-awaalka ah?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Yes, I’d love to. What time shall we meet?
lines.somali: Haa, aad baan u jeclaan lahaa. Saacaddee ayaan kulmaynaa?

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: The fictional music club practises song before its community performance.
lines.somali: Naadiga muusigga ee mala-awaalka ahi wuxuu song ku tababartaa kahor bandhiggiisa bulshada.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: That sounds good. I will confirm the plan tomorrow.
lines.somali: Taasi way fiican tahay. Berri ayaan qorshaha xaqiijinayaa.

lessons.speakingPractice: Samee role-play A2 ah oo ku saabsan Muusigga; isticmaal xog mala-awaal ah, sabab iyo faahfaahin cad.
lessons.writingPractice: Qor 6–10 jumladood oo ku saabsan Muusigga, adigoo adeegsanaya xog tusaale ah.
lessons.summarySomali: Waxaad casharkan ku baratay Muusigga, collocations-keeda, grammar-ka lagama maarmaanka ah iyo sida loogu adeegsado xaalad firaaqo oo dabiici ah.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Filimada iyo telefishinka waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad, examples free-time oo dabiici ah, grammar A2 iyo practice kala duwan.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga iyo phrases-ka Filimada iyo telefishinka.
Adeegso grammar-ka casharkan jumlado dabiici ah.
Samee speaking iyo writing task adigoo adeegsanaya xog mala-awaal ah.

commonMistakesSomali: Ha isku khaldin verb-ing iyo to + verb; eeg falka ka horreeya.
Present Perfect ha la raacin yesterday ama finished time.
Sports-ka u dooro play, go ama do collocation-ka saxda ah.

dialogues.titleSomali: Filimada iyo telefishinka: wada hadal koowaad • vocabulary • comprehension • role-play

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: What do you usually do in your fictional free-time plan?
lines.somali: Maxaad caadi ahaan ku samaysaa qorshaha firaaqada ee tusaalaha ah?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: The fictional film includes clear English subtitles for language learners.
lines.somali: Film-ga mala-awaalka ahi wuxuu ardayda luqadda u leeyahay qoraal-hoosaad English ah oo cad.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Why do you enjoy that activity?
lines.somali: Maxaad hawshaas ugu raaxaysataa?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Because it is relaxing and fits my example schedule.
lines.somali: Sababtoo ah waa nasasho, waxayna ku habboon tahay jadwalkayga tusaalaha ah.

dialogues.titleSomali: Filimada iyo telefishinka: wada hadal labaad • response • best answer • speaking

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Would you like to join our fictional activity on Saturday?
lines.somali: Ma jeclaan lahayd inaad Sabtida nagula soo biirto hawsha mala-awaalka ah?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Yes, I’d love to. What time shall we meet?
lines.somali: Haa, aad baan u jeclaan lahaa. Saacaddee ayaan kulmaynaa?

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: The fictional movie includes clear English subtitles for language learners.
lines.somali: Movie-ga mala-awaalka ahi wuxuu ardayda luqadda u leeyahay qoraal-hoosaad English ah oo cad.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: That sounds good. I will confirm the plan tomorrow.
lines.somali: Taasi way fiican tahay. Berri ayaan qorshaha xaqiijinayaa.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Buugaagta iyo akhriska waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad, examples free-time oo dabiici ah, grammar A2 iyo practice kala duwan.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga iyo phrases-ka Buugaagta iyo akhriska.
Adeegso grammar-ka casharkan jumlado dabiici ah.
Samee speaking iyo writing task adigoo adeegsanaya xog mala-awaal ah.

grammar.explanationSomali: Casharku wuxuu vocabulary-ga ku xiriirinayaa Present Simple iyo weedho isgaarsiin oo heerka A2 ah.
grammar.rule: Adeegso vocabulary-ga casharkan jumlad dabiici ah oo leh subject, verb iyo free-time context.

commonMistakesSomali: Ha isku khaldin verb-ing iyo to + verb; eeg falka ka horreeya.
Present Perfect ha la raacin yesterday ama finished time.
Sports-ka u dooro play, go ama do collocation-ka saxda ah.

dialogues.titleSomali: Buugaagta iyo akhriska: wada hadal koowaad • vocabulary • comprehension • role-play

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: What do you usually do in your fictional free-time plan?
lines.somali: Maxaad caadi ahaan ku samaysaa qorshaha firaaqada ee tusaalaha ah?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: The reader found the book while using a fictional library catalogue.
lines.somali: Akhristuhu wuxuu book ka helay diiwaanka maktabadda ee mala-awaalka ah.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Why do you enjoy that activity?
lines.somali: Maxaad hawshaas ugu raaxaysataa?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Because it is relaxing and fits my example schedule.
lines.somali: Sababtoo ah waa nasasho, waxayna ku habboon tahay jadwalkayga tusaalaha ah.

dialogues.titleSomali: Buugaagta iyo akhriska: wada hadal labaad • response • best answer • speaking

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Would you like to join our fictional activity on Saturday?
lines.somali: Ma jeclaan lahayd inaad Sabtida nagula soo biirto hawsha mala-awaalka ah?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Yes, I’d love to. What time shall we meet?
lines.somali: Haa, aad baan u jeclaan lahaa. Saacaddee ayaan kulmaynaa?

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: The reader found the story while using a fictional library catalogue.
lines.somali: Akhristuhu wuxuu story ka helay diiwaanka maktabadda ee mala-awaalka ah.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: That sounds good. I will confirm the plan tomorrow.
lines.somali: Taasi way fiican tahay. Berri ayaan qorshaha xaqiijinayaa.

lessons.speakingPractice: Samee role-play A2 ah oo ku saabsan Buugaagta iyo akhriska; isticmaal xog mala-awaal ah, sabab iyo faahfaahin cad.
lessons.writingPractice: Qor 6–10 jumladood oo ku saabsan Buugaagta iyo akhriska, adigoo adeegsanaya xog tusaale ah.
lessons.summarySomali: Waxaad casharkan ku baratay Buugaagta iyo akhriska, collocations-keeda, grammar-ka lagama maarmaanka ah iyo sida loogu adeegsado xaalad firaaqo oo dabiici ah.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Sharaxaadda madadaalada waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad, examples free-time oo dabiici ah, grammar A2 iyo practice kala duwan.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga iyo phrases-ka Sharaxaadda madadaalada.
Adeegso grammar-ka casharkan jumlado dabiici ah.
Samee speaking iyo writing task adigoo adeegsanaya xog mala-awaal ah.

positiveExamples.english: The fictional book is interesting because every chapter introduces a new mystery.
positiveExamples.somali: Buugga mala-awaalka ahi waa xiiso leh, sababtoo ah cutub kasta wuxuu soo bandhigayaa arrin cusub.

positiveExamples.english: The long programme became boring because the same scene appeared several times.
positiveExamples.somali: Barnaamijkii dheeraa wuxuu noqday caajis, sababtoo ah isla muuqaalkii ayaa dhowr jeer soo noqday.

positiveExamples.english: The final match was exciting because both teams scored in the last ten minutes.

commonMistakesSomali: Ha isku khaldin verb-ing iyo to + verb; eeg falka ka horreeya.
Present Perfect ha la raacin yesterday ama finished time.
Sports-ka u dooro play, go ama do collocation-ka saxda ah.

dialogues.titleSomali: Sharaxaadda madadaalada: wada hadal koowaad • vocabulary • comprehension • role-play

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: What do you usually do in your fictional free-time plan?
lines.somali: Maxaad caadi ahaan ku samaysaa qorshaha firaaqada ee tusaalaha ah?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: The fictional book is interesting because every chapter introduces a new mystery.
lines.somali: Buugga mala-awaalka ahi waa xiiso leh, sababtoo ah cutub kasta wuxuu soo bandhigayaa arrin cusub.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Why do you enjoy that activity?
lines.somali: Maxaad hawshaas ugu raaxaysataa?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Because it is relaxing and fits my example schedule.
lines.somali: Sababtoo ah waa nasasho, waxayna ku habboon tahay jadwalkayga tusaalaha ah.

dialogues.titleSomali: Sharaxaadda madadaalada: wada hadal labaad • response • best answer • speaking

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Would you like to join our fictional activity on Saturday?
lines.somali: Ma jeclaan lahayd inaad Sabtida nagula soo biirto hawsha mala-awaalka ah?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Yes, I’d love to. What time shall we meet?
lines.somali: Haa, aad baan u jeclaan lahaa. Saacaddee ayaan kulmaynaa?

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: The long programme became boring because the same scene appeared several times.
lines.somali: Barnaamijkii dheeraa wuxuu noqday caajis, sababtoo ah isla muuqaalkii ayaa dhowr jeer soo noqday.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: That sounds good. I will confirm the plan tomorrow.
lines.somali: Taasi way fiican tahay. Berri ayaan qorshaha xaqiijinayaa.

lessons.titleEnglish: Adjectives Ending in Ing and Ed
lessons.titleSomali: Sifooyinka ku dhammaada Ing iyo Ed
lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Sifooyinka ku dhammaada Ing iyo Ed waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad, examples free-time oo dabiici ah, grammar A2 iyo practice kala duwan.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga iyo phrases-ka Sifooyinka ku dhammaada Ing iyo Ed.
Adeegso grammar-ka casharkan jumlado dabiici ah.
Samee speaking iyo writing task adigoo adeegsanaya xog mala-awaal ah.

grammar.titleEnglish: Adjectives Ending in Ing and Ed grammar
grammar.titleSomali: Naxwaha Sifooyinka ku dhammaada Ing iyo Ed
grammar.explanationSomali: Sifada -ing waxay tilmaamaysaa waxa dareenka keena; sifada -ed waxay tilmaamaysaa qofka dareemaya.
grammar.rule: Sifada -ing waxay tilmaamaysaa waxa dareenka keena; sifada -ed waxay tilmaamaysaa qofka dareemaya.
grammar.sentenceStructure: thing + be + adjective-ing; person + be/feel + adjective-ed.

dialogues.titleSomali: Sifooyinka ku dhammaada Ing iyo Ed: wada hadal koowaad • vocabulary • comprehension • role-play

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: What do you usually do in your fictional free-time plan?
lines.somali: Maxaad caadi ahaan ku samaysaa qorshaha firaaqada ee tusaalaha ah?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: The fictional book is interesting because every chapter introduces a new mystery.
lines.somali: Buugga mala-awaalka ahi waa xiiso leh, sababtoo ah cutub kasta wuxuu soo bandhigayaa arrin cusub.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Why do you enjoy that activity?
lines.somali: Maxaad hawshaas ugu raaxaysataa?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Because it is relaxing and fits my example schedule.
lines.somali: Sababtoo ah waa nasasho, waxayna ku habboon tahay jadwalkayga tusaalaha ah.

dialogues.titleSomali: Sifooyinka ku dhammaada Ing iyo Ed: wada hadal labaad • response • best answer • speaking

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Would you like to join our fictional activity on Saturday?
lines.somali: Ma jeclaan lahayd inaad Sabtida nagula soo biirto hawsha mala-awaalka ah?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Yes, I’d love to. What time shall we meet?
lines.somali: Haa, aad baan u jeclaan lahaa. Saacaddee ayaan kulmaynaa?

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: The learners are interested in the film because it uses clear English subtitles.
lines.somali: Ardaydu way xiisaynayaan filimka, sababtoo ah wuxuu adeegsadaa qoraal-hoosaad English ah oo cad.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: That sounds good. I will confirm the plan tomorrow.
lines.somali: Taasi way fiican tahay. Berri ayaan qorshaha xaqiijinayaa.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Bixinta ra’yiga waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad, examples free-time oo dabiici ah, grammar A2 iyo practice kala duwan.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga iyo phrases-ka Bixinta ra’yiga.
Adeegso grammar-ka casharkan jumlado dabiici ah.
Samee speaking iyo writing task adigoo adeegsanaya xog mala-awaal ah.

lessons.speakingPractice: Bixi ra’yi, sabab iyo khilaaf edeb leh oo ku saabsan buug mala-awaal ah.

lessons.summarySomali: Waxaad casharkan ku baratay Bixinta ra’yiga, collocations-keeda, grammar-ka lagama maarmaanka ah iyo sida loogu adeegsado xaalad firaaqo oo dabiici ah.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Ku talinta wax waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad, examples free-time oo dabiici ah, grammar A2 iyo practice kala duwan.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga iyo phrases-ka Ku talinta wax.
Adeegso grammar-ka casharkan jumlado dabiici ah.
Samee speaking iyo writing task adigoo adeegsanaya xog mala-awaal ah.

grammar.explanationSomali: Should + base verb iyo might + base verb waxay bixiyaan talo; recommend waxaa raaci kara noun ama verb-ing.
grammar.rule: Should + base verb iyo might + base verb waxay bixiyaan talo; recommend waxaa raaci kara noun ama verb-ing.
grammar.sentenceStructure: subject + recommend + noun/verb-ing; you + should/might + base verb.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Samaynta casuumaadaha waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad, examples free-time oo dabiici ah, grammar A2 iyo practice kala duwan.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga iyo phrases-ka Samaynta casuumaadaha.
Adeegso grammar-ka casharkan jumlado dabiici ah.
Samee speaking iyo writing task adigoo adeegsanaya xog mala-awaal ah.

grammar.explanationSomali: Would you like waxaa raaca to + verb; How about iyo What about waxaa raaca noun ama verb-ing.
grammar.rule: Would you like waxaa raaca to + verb; How about iyo What about waxaa raaca noun ama verb-ing.
grammar.sentenceStructure: Would you like + to + verb?; How about + verb-ing?; Shall we + base verb?

negativeExamples.english: They are not meeting at the fictional venue this evening.

questionExamples.somali: Intee jeer ayaad hawshan ku samaysaa jadwalka tusaalaha ah?

commonMistakesSomali: Ha isku khaldin verb-ing iyo to + verb; eeg falka ka horreeya.
Present Perfect ha la raacin yesterday ama finished time.
Sports-ka u dooro play, go ama do collocation-ka saxda ah.

dialogues.titleSomali: Samaynta casuumaadaha: wada hadal koowaad • vocabulary • comprehension • role-play

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: What do you usually do in your fictional free-time plan?
lines.somali: Maxaad caadi ahaan ku samaysaa qorshaha firaaqada ee tusaalaha ah?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: The invitation dialogue uses “Would you like to?” before the friends agree on Saturday’s fictional event.
lines.somali: Wada hadalka casuumaaddu wuxuu adeegsadaa “Would you like to?” kahor inta saaxiibbadu ku heshiin dhacdada Sabtida.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Why do you enjoy that activity?
lines.somali: Maxaad hawshaas ugu raaxaysataa?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Because it is relaxing and fits my example schedule.
lines.somali: Sababtoo ah waa nasasho, waxayna ku habboon tahay jadwalkayga tusaalaha ah.

dialogues.titleSomali: Samaynta casuumaadaha: wada hadal labaad • response • best answer • speaking

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Would you like to join our fictional activity on Saturday?
lines.somali: Ma jeclaan lahayd inaad Sabtida nagula soo biirto hawsha mala-awaalka ah?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Yes, I’d love to. What time shall we meet?
lines.somali: Haa, aad baan u jeclaan lahaa. Saacaddee ayaan kulmaynaa?

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: The invitation dialogue uses “Do you want to?” before the friends agree on Saturday’s fictional event.
lines.somali: Wada hadalka casuumaaddu wuxuu adeegsadaa “Do you want to?” kahor inta saaxiibbadu ku heshiin dhacdada Sabtida.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: That sounds good. I will confirm the plan tomorrow.
lines.somali: Taasi way fiican tahay. Berri ayaan qorshaha xaqiijinayaa.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Aqbalaadda iyo diidmada casuumaadaha waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad, examples free-time oo dabiici ah, grammar A2 iyo practice kala duwan.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga iyo phrases-ka Aqbalaadda iyo diidmada casuumaadaha.
Adeegso grammar-ka casharkan jumlado dabiici ah.
Samee speaking iyo writing task adigoo adeegsanaya xog mala-awaal ah.

dialogues.titleSomali: Aqbalaadda iyo diidmada casuumaadaha: wada hadal koowaad • vocabulary • comprehension • role-play

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: What do you usually do in your fictional free-time plan?
lines.somali: Maxaad caadi ahaan ku samaysaa qorshaha firaaqada ee tusaalaha ah?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: The invitation dialogue uses “I'd love to” before the friends agree on Saturday’s fictional event.
lines.somali: Wada hadalka casuumaaddu wuxuu adeegsadaa “I'd love to” kahor inta saaxiibbadu ku heshiin dhacdada Sabtida.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Why do you enjoy that activity?
lines.somali: Maxaad hawshaas ugu raaxaysataa?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Because it is relaxing and fits my example schedule.
lines.somali: Sababtoo ah waa nasasho, waxayna ku habboon tahay jadwalkayga tusaalaha ah.

dialogues.titleSomali: Aqbalaadda iyo diidmada casuumaadaha: wada hadal labaad • response • best answer • speaking

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Would you like to join our fictional activity on Saturday?
lines.somali: Ma jeclaan lahayd inaad Sabtida nagula soo biirto hawsha mala-awaalka ah?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Yes, I’d love to. What time shall we meet?
lines.somali: Haa, aad baan u jeclaan lahaa. Saacaddee ayaan kulmaynaa?

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: The invitation dialogue uses “That sounds great” before the friends agree on Saturday’s fictional event.
lines.somali: Wada hadalka casuumaaddu wuxuu adeegsadaa “That sounds great” kahor inta saaxiibbadu ku heshiin dhacdada Sabtida.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: That sounds good. I will confirm the plan tomorrow.
lines.somali: Taasi way fiican tahay. Berri ayaan qorshaha xaqiijinayaa.

lessons.summarySomali: Waxaad casharkan ku baratay Aqbalaadda iyo diidmada casuumaadaha, collocations-keeda, grammar-ka lagama maarmaanka ah iyo sida loogu adeegsado xaalad firaaqo oo dabiici ah.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Qabanqaabinta kulanka ama hawsha waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad, examples free-time oo dabiici ah, grammar A2 iyo practice kala duwan.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga iyo phrases-ka Qabanqaabinta kulanka ama hawsha.
Adeegso grammar-ka casharkan jumlado dabiici ah.
Samee speaking iyo writing task adigoo adeegsanaya xog mala-awaal ah.

commonMistakesSomali: Ha isku khaldin verb-ing iyo to + verb; eeg falka ka horreeya.
Present Perfect ha la raacin yesterday ama finished time.
Sports-ka u dooro play, go ama do collocation-ka saxda ah.

dialogues.titleSomali: Qabanqaabinta kulanka ama hawsha: wada hadal koowaad • vocabulary • comprehension • role-play

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: What do you usually do in your fictional free-time plan?
lines.somali: Maxaad caadi ahaan ku samaysaa qorshaha firaaqada ee tusaalaha ah?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: The friends use meet while organizing the time and place for a fictional picnic.
lines.somali: Saaxiibbadu waxay meet adeegsadaan marka ay qabanqaabinayaan waqtiga iyo goobta dalxiis mala-awaal ah.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Why do you enjoy that activity?
lines.somali: Maxaad hawshaas ugu raaxaysataa?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Because it is relaxing and fits my example schedule.
lines.somali: Sababtoo ah waa nasasho, waxayna ku habboon tahay jadwalkayga tusaalaha ah.

dialogues.titleSomali: Qabanqaabinta kulanka ama hawsha: wada hadal labaad • response • best answer • speaking

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Would you like to join our fictional activity on Saturday?
lines.somali: Ma jeclaan lahayd inaad Sabtida nagula soo biirto hawsha mala-awaalka ah?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Yes, I’d love to. What time shall we meet?
lines.somali: Haa, aad baan u jeclaan lahaa. Saacaddee ayaan kulmaynaa?

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: The friends use arrange while organizing the time and place for a fictional picnic.
lines.somali: Saaxiibbadu waxay arrange adeegsadaan marka ay qabanqaabinayaan waqtiga iyo goobta dalxiis mala-awaal ah.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: That sounds good. I will confirm the plan tomorrow.
lines.somali: Taasi way fiican tahay. Berri ayaan qorshaha xaqiijinayaa.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Isku-xirka fikradaha waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad, examples free-time oo dabiici ah, grammar A2 iyo practice kala duwan.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga iyo phrases-ka Isku-xirka fikradaha.
Adeegso grammar-ka casharkan jumlado dabiici ah.
Samee speaking iyo writing task adigoo adeegsanaya xog mala-awaal ah.

grammar.explanationSomali: And wax ayuu ku daraa, but/although isbarbardhig ka duwan ayay muujiyaan, because sabab ayuu bixiyaa, so-na natiijo.
grammar.rule: And wax ayuu ku daraa, but/although isbarbardhig ka duwan ayay muujiyaan, because sabab ayuu bixiyaa, so-na natiijo.

dialogues.titleSomali: Isku-xirka fikradaha: wada hadal koowaad • vocabulary • comprehension • role-play

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: What do you usually do in your fictional free-time plan?
lines.somali: Maxaad caadi ahaan ku samaysaa qorshaha firaaqada ee tusaalaha ah?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: The writer uses “And” to connect two clear ideas about a weekend activity.
lines.somali: Qoraagu wuxuu “And” u adeegsadaa inuu isku xiro laba fikradood oo cad oo hawl toddobaadle ah.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Why do you enjoy that activity?
lines.somali: Maxaad hawshaas ugu raaxaysataa?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Because it is relaxing and fits my example schedule.
lines.somali: Sababtoo ah waa nasasho, waxayna ku habboon tahay jadwalkayga tusaalaha ah.

dialogues.titleSomali: Isku-xirka fikradaha: wada hadal labaad • response • best answer • speaking

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Would you like to join our fictional activity on Saturday?
lines.somali: Ma jeclaan lahayd inaad Sabtida nagula soo biirto hawsha mala-awaalka ah?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Yes, I’d love to. What time shall we meet?
lines.somali: Haa, aad baan u jeclaan lahaa. Saacaddee ayaan kulmaynaa?

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: The writer uses “But” to connect two clear ideas about a weekend activity.
lines.somali: Qoraagu wuxuu “But” u adeegsadaa inuu isku xiro laba fikradood oo cad oo hawl toddobaadle ah.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: That sounds good. I will confirm the plan tomorrow.
lines.somali: Taasi way fiican tahay. Berri ayaan qorshaha xaqiijinayaa.

lessons.titleSomali: Ka hadalka hawlo firaaqo oo hore
lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Ka hadalka hawlo firaaqo oo hore waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad, examples free-time oo dabiici ah, grammar A2 iyo practice kala duwan.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga iyo phrases-ka Ka hadalka hawlo firaaqo oo hore.
Adeegso grammar-ka casharkan jumlado dabiici ah.
Samee speaking iyo writing task adigoo adeegsanaya xog mala-awaal ah.

dialogues.titleSomali: Weekend hore • 130–180 words • sequence • comprehension

lines.speaker: Narrator
lines.english: Last Saturday, Mariam and her cousins planned a free afternoon near their fictional community centre. First, they borrowed two bicycles and rode along a quiet path. Then they stopped beside a public garden because Mariam wanted to take photographs of the flowers. After that, they met two friends and played a short volleyball match. Their team lost the first game, but they won the second one by three points. Later, rain began, so everyone went indoors and chose a board game. Mariam did not know the rules, but her cousin explained them clearly. They laughed because one player moved the wrong piece twice. Finally, the group drank tea and discussed the day. Mariam was tired, although she felt happy about trying several activities. She returned the bicycles before six and went home with her cousins. The afternoon was simple, but it gave everyone a relaxing break after a busy week.
lines.somali: Sabtidii hore, Mariam iyo ilma-adeerradeed waxay qorsheeyeen galab firaaqo ah oo ka dhacaysa xarun bulsho oo mala-awaal ah. Marka hore baaskiillo ayay amaahdeen. Kadib waxay sawirro ka qaadeen ubaxa, kubbadda laliska ciyaareen, ciyaar miisna gudaha ku ciyaareen markii roobku bilowday. Ugu dambayn shaah ayay cabbeen oo maalinta ka wada hadleen. Mariam way daashay, laakiin waxay ku faraxday hawlihii kala duwanaa.

lines.speaker: Question
lines.english: What did the group do after the rain began?
lines.somali: Maxay kooxdu samaysay markii roobku bilowday?

lines.speaker: Answer
lines.english: They went indoors and played a board game.
lines.somali: Gudaha ayay galeen oo ciyaar miis ayay ciyaareen.

dialogues.titleSomali: Ka hadalka hawlo firaaqo oo hore: wada hadal koowaad • vocabulary • comprehension • role-play

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: What do you usually do in your fictional free-time plan?
lines.somali: Maxaad caadi ahaan ku samaysaa qorshaha firaaqada ee tusaalaha ah?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: The weekend story uses “Last weekend” while describing a completed fictional activity.
lines.somali: Sheekada toddobaadku waxay “Last weekend” adeegsanaysaa marka ay sharxayso hawl mala-awaal ah oo dhammaatay.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Why do you enjoy that activity?
lines.somali: Maxaad hawshaas ugu raaxaysataa?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Because it is relaxing and fits my example schedule.
lines.somali: Sababtoo ah waa nasasho, waxayna ku habboon tahay jadwalkayga tusaalaha ah.

dialogues.titleSomali: Ka hadalka hawlo firaaqo oo hore: wada hadal labaad • response • best answer • speaking

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Would you like to join our fictional activity on Saturday?
lines.somali: Ma jeclaan lahayd inaad Sabtida nagula soo biirto hawsha mala-awaalka ah?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Yes, I’d love to. What time shall we meet?
lines.somali: Haa, aad baan u jeclaan lahaa. Saacaddee ayaan kulmaynaa?

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: The weekend story uses “Visited” while describing a completed fictional activity.
lines.somali: Sheekada toddobaadku waxay “Visited” adeegsanaysaa marka ay sharxayso hawl mala-awaal ah oo dhammaatay.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: That sounds good. I will confirm the plan tomorrow.
lines.somali: Taasi way fiican tahay. Berri ayaan qorshaha xaqiijinayaa.

grammar.explanationSomali: Present Perfect experience ayuu sheegaa iyadoo aan waqti dhammaaday la xusin; Past Simple wuxuu la socdaa last month ama finished time.
grammar.rule: Present Perfect experience ayuu sheegaa iyadoo aan waqti dhammaaday la xusin; Past Simple wuxuu la socdaa last month ama finished time.
grammar.sentenceStructure: have/has + past participle; subject + past verb + finished time.

dialogues.titleSomali: Ka hadalka waayo-aragnimada madadaalada: wada hadal koowaad • vocabulary • comprehension • role-play

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: What do you usually do in your fictional free-time plan?
lines.somali: Maxaad caadi ahaan ku samaysaa qorshaha firaaqada ee tusaalaha ah?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: The conversation uses “Have you ever attended?” to compare entertainment experience with a finished past event.
lines.somali: Wada hadalku wuxuu “Have you ever attended?” u adeegsadaa isbarbardhigga waayo-aragnimada madadaalada iyo dhacdo hore.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Why do you enjoy that activity?
lines.somali: Maxaad hawshaas ugu raaxaysataa?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Because it is relaxing and fits my example schedule.
lines.somali: Sababtoo ah waa nasasho, waxayna ku habboon tahay jadwalkayga tusaalaha ah.

dialogues.titleSomali: Ka hadalka waayo-aragnimada madadaalada: wada hadal labaad • response • best answer • speaking

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Would you like to join our fictional activity on Saturday?
lines.somali: Ma jeclaan lahayd inaad Sabtida nagula soo biirto hawsha mala-awaalka ah?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Yes, I’d love to. What time shall we meet?
lines.somali: Haa, aad baan u jeclaan lahaa. Saacaddee ayaan kulmaynaa?

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: The conversation uses “Have never joined” to compare entertainment experience with a finished past event.
lines.somali: Wada hadalku wuxuu “Have never joined” u adeegsadaa isbarbardhigga waayo-aragnimada madadaalada iyo dhacdo hore.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: That sounds good. I will confirm the plan tomorrow.
lines.somali: Taasi way fiican tahay. Berri ayaan qorshaha xaqiijinayaa.

grammar.titleEnglish: Understanding Event Posters and Tickets grammar
grammar.titleSomali: Naxwaha Fahamka posters-ka iyo tigidhada dhacdooyinka
grammar.explanationSomali: Poster ama ticket waxaa laga raadiyaa date, time, venue, price iyo booking details.
grammar.rule: Poster ama ticket waxaa laga raadiyaa date, time, venue, price iyo booking details.

commonMistakesSomali: Ha isku khaldin verb-ing iyo to + verb; eeg falka ka horreeya.
Present Perfect ha la raacin yesterday ama finished time.
Sports-ka u dooro play, go ama do collocation-ka saxda ah.

dialogues.titleSomali: 1. Nature Photo Walk — event poster • mock data • comprehension

lines.speaker: Card
lines.english: Saturday 12 September 2026, 09:00–11:00, Green Park Gate, free, ages 12+, register in the fictional club office, bring water.
lines.somali: Socod sawir dabiici ah: Sabti 12 Sebtembar 2026, 09:00–11:00, albaabka Green Park, bilaash, 12+, iska diiwaangeli xafiiska naadiga, biyo keen.

lines.speaker: Question
lines.english: What are the date, start time, finish time, venue, price, and booking details?
lines.somali: Maxay yihiin taariikhda, bilowga, dhammaadka, goobta, qiimaha iyo xogta booking-ku?

lines.speaker: Answer
lines.english: Read each labelled detail on this fictional card and calculate the duration from its two times.
lines.somali: Akhri faahfaahin kasta oo ku qoran kaarkan mala-awaalka ah, muddada ka xisaabi labada waqti.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Fahamka faallooyinka waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad, examples free-time oo dabiici ah, grammar A2 iyo practice kala duwan.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga iyo phrases-ka Fahamka faallooyinka.
Adeegso grammar-ka casharkan jumlado dabiici ah.
Samee speaking iyo writing task adigoo adeegsanaya xog mala-awaal ah.

grammar.explanationSomali: Review-ga wanaagsan wuxuu leeyahay sharaxaad kooban, opinion, good point, weak point iyo recommendation.
grammar.rule: Review-ga wanaagsan wuxuu leeyahay sharaxaad kooban, opinion, good point, weak point iyo recommendation.

dialogues.titleSomali: Film review — Two Small Shops — 4/5

lines.speaker: Reviewer
lines.english: This fictional film follows two friends who open small shops. The characters are warm and funny, although the final scene is slow. I recommend it to viewers who enjoy light comedies.
lines.somali: Filimkan mala-awaalka ahi wuxuu ka hadlayaa laba saaxiib oo dukaamo yaryar furay. Jilayaashu waa wanaagsan yihiin oo qosol leh, inkastoo muuqaalkii dambe gaabis yahay. Waxaan kula talinayaa dadka jecel majaajillada fudud.

lines.speaker: Question
lines.english: What positive detail, negative detail, and recommendation does the review give?
lines.somali: Waa maxay faahfaahinta wanaagsan, tan taban iyo talada faalladu bixisay?

lines.speaker: Answer
lines.english: Identify the opinion words and the recommendation in the fictional review.
lines.somali: Ka hel erayada ra’yiga iyo talada faallada mala-awaalka ah.

dialogues.titleSomali: Book review — The Quiet Garden — 4/5

lines.speaker: Reviewer
lines.english: The short fictional novel has clear language and an interesting main character. One middle chapter is confusing, but the hopeful ending is enjoyable. I recommend it to A2 readers.
lines.somali: Riwaayaddan gaaban ee mala-awaalka ahi waxay leedahay luqad cad iyo qof sheeko oo xiiso leh. Hal cutub waa jahawareer, laakiin dhammaadku waa lagu raaxaysan karaa. Waxaan kula talinayaa akhristayaasha A2.

lines.speaker: Question
lines.english: What positive detail, negative detail, and recommendation does the review give?
lines.somali: Waa maxay faahfaahinta wanaagsan, tan taban iyo talada faalladu bixisay?

lines.speaker: Answer
lines.english: Identify the opinion words and the recommendation in the fictional review.
lines.somali: Ka hel erayada ra’yiga iyo talada faallada mala-awaalka ah.

dialogues.titleSomali: Sports review — Harbour Final — 3/5

lines.speaker: Reviewer
lines.english: Both fictional teams played well, and the final ten minutes were exciting. The long break was disappointing. Sports fans might enjoy watching the recorded match.
lines.somali: Labada kooxood ee mala-awaalka ahi si fiican ayay u ciyaareen, tobankii daqiiqo ee ugu dambeeyeyna xamaasad ayay lahaayeen. Nasashadii dheerayd waxay ahayd niyad-jab. Taageerayaashu way ku raaxaysan karaan ciyaarta la duubay.

lines.speaker: Question
lines.english: What positive detail, negative detail, and recommendation does the review give?
lines.somali: Waa maxay faahfaahinta wanaagsan, tan taban iyo talada faalladu bixisay?

lines.speaker: Answer
lines.english: Identify the opinion words and the recommendation in the fictional review.
lines.somali: Ka hel erayada ra’yiga iyo talada faallada mala-awaalka ah.

dialogues.titleSomali: Music review — Community Voices — 5/5

lines.speaker: Reviewer
lines.english: The singers performed creative original songs, and the audience joined the last one. The hall was crowded, but the sound was clear. I strongly recommend this fictional performance.
lines.somali: Heesayaashu waxay qaadeen heeso cusub oo hal-abuur leh, daawadayaashuna heestii dambe ayay la qaadeen. Hoolku wuu buuxay, laakiin codku wuu caddaa. Aad ayaan ugu talinayaa bandhiggan mala-awaalka ah.

lines.speaker: Question
lines.english: What positive detail, negative detail, and recommendation does the review give?
lines.somali: Waa maxay faahfaahinta wanaagsan, tan taban iyo talada faalladu bixisay?

lines.speaker: Answer
lines.english: Identify the opinion words and the recommendation in the fictional review.
lines.somali: Ka hel erayada ra’yiga iyo talada faallada mala-awaalka ah.

dialogues.titleSomali: Activity review — Saturday Photo Walk — 4/5

lines.speaker: Reviewer
lines.english: The leader explained simple camera techniques and gave everyone time to practise. The walk started late, although the park was beautiful. Beginners may enjoy this fictional community activity.
lines.somali: Hoggaamiyuhu wuxuu sharxay farsamooyin kamarad oo fudud, qof walbana waqti tababar ayuu siiyey. Socodku wuu daahay, inkastoo beertu qurux badnayd. Bilowgayaashu way ku raaxaysan karaan hawshan mala-awaalka ah.

lines.speaker: Question
lines.english: What positive detail, negative detail, and recommendation does the review give?
lines.somali: Waa maxay faahfaahinta wanaagsan, tan taban iyo talada faalladu bixisay?

lines.speaker: Answer
lines.english: Identify the opinion words and the recommendation in the fictional review.
lines.somali: Ka hel erayada ra’yiga iyo talada faallada mala-awaalka ah.

grammar.explanationSomali: Invitation-ku wuxuu si cad u sheegayaa activity, date, time, place iyo codsi confirmation.
grammar.rule: Invitation-ku wuxuu si cad u sheegayaa activity, date, time, place iyo codsi confirmation.
grammar.sentenceStructure: greeting + invitation + details + confirmation request + ending.

commonMistakesSomali: Ha isku khaldin verb-ing iyo to + verb; eeg falka ka horreeya.
Present Perfect ha la raacin yesterday ama finished time.
Sports-ka u dooro play, go ama do collocation-ka saxda ah.

dialogues.titleSomali: Casuumaad dhammaystiran • structure • writing model

lines.speaker: Hodan
lines.english: Hi Amina, Would you like to join our fictional picnic on Friday afternoon? We are meeting at City Park at three o’clock. Please bring something to drink. Let me know if you can come. See you, Hodan.
lines.somali: Salaan Amina, Ma jeclaan lahayd inaad nagula soo biirto dalxiis cunto leh oo mala-awaal ah Jimcaha galab? Waxaan City Park ku kulmaynaa saddexda. Fadlan wax la cabbo keen. Ii soo sheeg haddii aad iman karto. Waan is arki doonnaa, Hodan.

lines.speaker: Amina
lines.english: Thank you for inviting me. I’d love to come, and I will confirm on Thursday.
lines.somali: Waad ku mahadsan tahay casuumaadda. Aad baan u jeclaan lahaa inaan imaado, Khamiistana waan xaqiijinayaa.

dialogues.titleSomali: Qorista casuumaad: wada hadal koowaad • vocabulary • comprehension • role-play

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: What do you usually do in your fictional free-time plan?
lines.somali: Maxaad caadi ahaan ku samaysaa qorshaha firaaqada ee tusaalaha ah?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: The sample invitation includes a clear greeting so the guest can answer easily.
lines.somali: Casuumaadda tusaalaha ahi waxay leedahay greeting cad si martidu si fudud uga jawaabto.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Why do you enjoy that activity?
lines.somali: Maxaad hawshaas ugu raaxaysataa?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Because it is relaxing and fits my example schedule.
lines.somali: Sababtoo ah waa nasasho, waxayna ku habboon tahay jadwalkayga tusaalaha ah.

dialogues.titleSomali: Qorista casuumaad: wada hadal labaad • response • best answer • speaking

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Would you like to join our fictional activity on Saturday?
lines.somali: Ma jeclaan lahayd inaad Sabtida nagula soo biirto hawsha mala-awaalka ah?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Yes, I’d love to. What time shall we meet?
lines.somali: Haa, aad baan u jeclaan lahaa. Saacaddee ayaan kulmaynaa?

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: The sample invitation includes a clear activity so the guest can answer easily.
lines.somali: Casuumaadda tusaalaha ahi waxay leedahay activity cad si martidu si fudud uga jawaabto.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: That sounds good. I will confirm the plan tomorrow.
lines.somali: Taasi way fiican tahay. Berri ayaan qorshaha xaqiijinayaa.

dialogues.titleSomali: Faallo 100–160 words • fictional film • writing model

lines.speaker: Reviewer
lines.english: A Relaxing Saturday is a fictional short film about three neighbours who create a small community garden. The story is easy to follow, and the English subtitles are clear. In my opinion, the best part is the teamwork between the main characters. Their conversations are natural, so A2 learners can notice useful everyday phrases. The garden scenes are also colourful and relaxing. However, the middle of the film becomes a little slow because the same problem is discussed several times. The final scene is enjoyable, although I wanted to learn more about one character. I recommend this film to learners who like gentle stories and outdoor activities. It is worth watching with a friend because you can discuss the characters and practise giving opinions afterwards.
lines.somali: A Relaxing Saturday waa filim gaaban oo mala-awaal ah oo ku saabsan saddex deris oo beer bulsho sameeya. Sheekadu waa fududahay, qoraal-hoosaadkuna waa cad yahay. Qaybta ugu fiican waa wada shaqaynta jilayaasha. Qaybta dhexe xoogaa way gaabis tahay, laakiin filimku wuxuu ku habboon yahay ardayda jecel sheekooyinka deggan iyo hawlaha dibadda.

lines.speaker: Question
lines.english: Which sentence gives the weak point, and who may enjoy the film?
lines.somali: Jumladdee sheegaysa qodobka daciifka ah, yaase filimka ku raaxaysan kara?

lines.speaker: Answer
lines.english: The middle is slow; learners who like gentle stories and outdoor activities may enjoy it.
lines.somali: Qaybta dhexe waa gaabis; ardayda jecel sheekooyinka deggan iyo hawlaha dibadda ayaa ku raaxaysan kara.

dialogues.titleSomali: Qorista faallo gaaban: wada hadal koowaad • vocabulary • comprehension • role-play

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: What do you usually do in your fictional free-time plan?
lines.somali: Maxaad caadi ahaan ku samaysaa qorshaha firaaqada ee tusaalaha ah?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: The fictional review title explains one strong point and one weak point before giving a recommendation.
lines.somali: Review title-ga mala-awaalka ahi wuxuu sharxayaa qodob fiican iyo qodob daciif ah kahor talada.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Why do you enjoy that activity?
lines.somali: Maxaad hawshaas ugu raaxaysataa?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Because it is relaxing and fits my example schedule.
lines.somali: Sababtoo ah waa nasasho, waxayna ku habboon tahay jadwalkayga tusaalaha ah.

dialogues.titleSomali: Qorista faallo gaaban: wada hadal labaad • response • best answer • speaking

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Would you like to join our fictional activity on Saturday?
lines.somali: Ma jeclaan lahayd inaad Sabtida nagula soo biirto hawsha mala-awaalka ah?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Yes, I’d love to. What time shall we meet?
lines.somali: Haa, aad baan u jeclaan lahaa. Saacaddee ayaan kulmaynaa?

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: The fictional introduction explains one strong point and one weak point before giving a recommendation.
lines.somali: Introduction-ga mala-awaalka ahi wuxuu sharxayaa qodob fiican iyo qodob daciif ah kahor talada.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: That sounds good. I will confirm the plan tomorrow.
lines.somali: Taasi way fiican tahay. Berri ayaan qorshaha xaqiijinayaa.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Akhrinta qoraal ku saabsan hiwaayad waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad, examples free-time oo dabiici ah, grammar A2 iyo practice kala duwan.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga iyo phrases-ka Akhrinta qoraal ku saabsan hiwaayad.
Adeegso grammar-ka casharkan jumlado dabiici ah.
Samee speaking iyo writing task adigoo adeegsanaya xog mala-awaal ah.

dialogues.titleSomali: Amina iyo photography • 190–260 words • reading

lines.speaker: Narrator
lines.english: Amina became interested in photography two years ago when her aunt lent her a small camera. At first, she took pictures of flowers and buildings near her fictional neighbourhood. Many photographs were dark, but she did not stop practising. She watched short lessons online and wrote simple notes about light, distance, and colour. Last year, Amina joined a community photography club. The group meets twice a month in a public learning hall and sometimes goes for photo walks on Saturday mornings. Amina has already learned how to plan a picture before pressing the camera button. She has also taken photographs at three fictional community events. Her favourite experience was a garden exhibition because visitors asked friendly questions about her work. She has never sold a photograph, and that is not her present goal. She enjoys sharing pictures with the club and receiving useful suggestions. Last month, one of her nature photographs appeared in the club’s small exhibition. Amina felt excited, although she was nervous when people looked at it. Since joining the club, she has become more confident and careful. Next month, she plans to help a new member understand the camera. Photography is still a relaxing hobby for her, but it has also helped her meet people, explore outdoor places, and notice small details in everyday life.
lines.somali: Amina waxay sawir-qaadista xiisaysay laba sano kahor markii eeddadeed kamarad yar amaahisay. Bilowgii sawirradeedu way mugdi badnaayeen, laakiin tababarka ma joojin. Sannadkii hore waxay ku biirtay naadi bulsho oo sawir-qaadis ah. Waxay hore u baratay qorshaynta sawirka, waxayna sawirro ka qaaday saddex dhacdo oo mala-awaal ah. Tan iyo markii ay naadiga ku biirtay, kalsoonideedu way kordhay. Bisha dambe waxay qorshaynaysaa inay xubin cusub caawiso.

lines.speaker: Question
lines.english: Why did Amina join the club, and what has changed since then?
lines.somali: Maxay Amina naadiga ugu biirtay, maxaase tan iyo markaas isbeddelay?

lines.speaker: Answer
lines.english: She wanted to improve and share ideas; she has become more confident and careful.
lines.somali: Waxay doonaysay horumar iyo fikrado wadaag; waxay noqotay qof kalsooni iyo taxaddar badan.

lines.speaker: Language
lines.english: “Joined last year” is Past Simple; “has become” is Present Perfect.
lines.somali: “Joined last year” waa Past Simple; “has become” waa Present Perfect.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Yes, I’d love to. What time shall we meet?

lines.english: The hobby article uses camera while describing Amina’s fictional photography journey.

commonMistakesSomali: Ha isku khaldin verb-ing iyo to + verb; eeg falka ka horreeya.
Present Perfect ha la raacin yesterday ama finished time.
Sports-ka u dooro play, go ama do collocation-ka saxda ah.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Khaladaadka caadiga ah waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad, examples free-time oo dabiici ah, grammar A2 iyo practice kala duwan.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga iyo phrases-ka Khaladaadka caadiga ah.
Adeegso grammar-ka casharkan jumlado dabiici ah.
Samee speaking iyo writing task adigoo adeegsanaya xog mala-awaal ah.

grammar.explanationSomali: Casharku wuxuu saxayaa verb-ing, to + verb, sports collocations, -ing/-ed adjectives iyo tense choice.
grammar.rule: Casharku wuxuu saxayaa verb-ing, to + verb, sports collocations, -ing/-ed adjectives iyo tense choice.

Present Perfect ha la raacin yesterday ama finished time.
Sports-ka u dooro play, go ama do collocation-ka saxda ah.

dialogues.titleSomali: Khaladaadka caadiga ah: wada hadal koowaad • vocabulary • comprehension • role-play

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: What do you usually do in your fictional free-time plan?
lines.somali: Maxaad caadi ahaan ku samaysaa qorshaha firaaqada ee tusaalaha ah?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: The correction task uses “Enjoy reading” as the natural form in a free-time sentence.
lines.somali: Layliga sixiddu wuxuu “Enjoy reading” u adeegsanayaa qaabka dabiiciga ah ee jumlad firaaqo.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Why do you enjoy that activity?
lines.somali: Maxaad hawshaas ugu raaxaysataa?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Because it is relaxing and fits my example schedule.
lines.somali: Sababtoo ah waa nasasho, waxayna ku habboon tahay jadwalkayga tusaalaha ah.

dialogues.titleSomali: Khaladaadka caadiga ah: wada hadal labaad • response • best answer • speaking

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Would you like to join our fictional activity on Saturday?
lines.somali: Ma jeclaan lahayd inaad Sabtida nagula soo biirto hawsha mala-awaalka ah?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Yes, I’d love to. What time shall we meet?
lines.somali: Haa, aad baan u jeclaan lahaa. Saacaddee ayaan kulmaynaa?

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: The correction task uses “Want to go” as the natural form in a free-time sentence.
lines.somali: Layliga sixiddu wuxuu “Want to go” u adeegsanayaa qaabka dabiiciga ah ee jumlad firaaqo.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: That sounds good. I will confirm the plan tomorrow.
lines.somali: Taasi way fiican tahay. Berri ayaan qorshaha xaqiijinayaa.

lessons.writingPractice: Qor 6–10 jumladood oo ku saabsan Khaladaadka caadiga ah, adigoo adeegsanaya xog tusaale ah.
lessons.summarySomali: Waxaad casharkan ku baratay Khaladaadka caadiga ah, collocations-keeda, grammar-ka lagama maarmaanka ah iyo sida loogu adeegsado xaalad firaaqo oo dabiici ah.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Dib-u-eegista Unit 8 waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad, examples free-time oo dabiici ah, grammar A2 iyo practice kala duwan.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga iyo phrases-ka Dib-u-eegista Unit 8.
Adeegso grammar-ka casharkan jumlado dabiici ah.
Samee speaking iyo writing task adigoo adeegsanaya xog mala-awaal ah.

dialogues.titleSomali: Dib-u-eegista Unit 8: wada hadal koowaad • vocabulary • comprehension • role-play

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: What do you usually do in your fictional free-time plan?
lines.somali: Maxaad caadi ahaan ku samaysaa qorshaha firaaqada ee tusaalaha ah?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: The Unit 8 review connects hobby review with a practical free-time communication task.
lines.somali: Dib-u-eegista Unit 8 waxay hobby review ku xiraysaa hawl isgaarsiin firaaqo oo wax-ku-ool ah.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Why do you enjoy that activity?
lines.somali: Maxaad hawshaas ugu raaxaysataa?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Because it is relaxing and fits my example schedule.
lines.somali: Sababtoo ah waa nasasho, waxayna ku habboon tahay jadwalkayga tusaalaha ah.

dialogues.titleSomali: Dib-u-eegista Unit 8: wada hadal labaad • response • best answer • speaking

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Would you like to join our fictional activity on Saturday?
lines.somali: Ma jeclaan lahayd inaad Sabtida nagula soo biirto hawsha mala-awaalka ah?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Yes, I’d love to. What time shall we meet?
lines.somali: Haa, aad baan u jeclaan lahaa. Saacaddee ayaan kulmaynaa?

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: The Unit 8 review connects verb-ing review with a practical free-time communication task.
lines.somali: Dib-u-eegista Unit 8 waxay verb-ing review ku xiraysaa hawl isgaarsiin firaaqo oo wax-ku-ool ah.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: That sounds good. I will confirm the plan tomorrow.
lines.somali: Taasi way fiican tahay. Berri ayaan qorshaha xaqiijinayaa.
